with what you have I would recommend:
Mouchette team: Mouchette, Aigis, Helot, Ramona/Lily (try to get Thais before she leaves)
Aequor team: GMurphy, Caecus, Celeste, Tulu (later this will change but should be fine for the start of the game)
If you really like Pickman, he can be used in a lot of different teams as a sub-dps/buffer. So slot him in when you need that role fulfilled

Wave 4 - gmurpjy and fish team
Wave 5 - ghelot thais aigis +1
